---
title: "dactylis"
author: "JL"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(AICcmodavg)
library(patchwork)
theme_set(theme_classic(base_size = 14)) #for ggplot

```

```{r}
dac <- read.csv(here("clean_data", "Dactylis_Demography_Data_CLEANED_2016thru2025.csv"))
climate <- read.csv(here("clean_data", "CGOP_climatevalues_scaled.csv"))

dac <- left_join(dac, climate, by = c("Year" = "year"))
dac <- dac %>% 
  mutate(Year = as.factor(Year), 
         Plot = as.factor(Plot),
         survT = as.character(survT),
         survT1 = as.character(survT1),
         pflowerT = as.character(pflowerT),
         pflowerT1 = as.character(pflowerT1),
         log.no.stems = log.no.stems,
         log.no.stemsT1 = log.no.stemsT1)

dac <- dac %>% 
  filter(!(Plot %in% c("4", "5", "15")))
```

```{r Sample Plots}
#sample plots
dac %>% ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = log.no.stemsT1, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "black", linewidth = .2)
dac %>% ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = log.no.stemsT1, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Year)+
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "black", linewidth = .2)
dac %>% ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = log.no.stemsT1, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Plot)+
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "black", linewidth = .2)
#plots 5, 4, 15 may need to be excluded - not many individuals for the random effects

#survival
dac %>% filter(!is.na(survT1)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = as.numeric(survT1), color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)
dac %>% filter(!is.na(survT1)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = as.numeric(survT1), color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Year)
dac %>% filter(!is.na(survT1)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems,  y = as.numeric(survT1), color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Plot)

#flowering
dac %>% filter(!is.na(pflowerT)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = as.numeric(pflowerT), color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)
dac %>% filter(!is.na(pflowerT)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = as.numeric(pflowerT), color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Year)
dac %>% filter(!is.na(pflowerT)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems,  y = as.numeric(pflowerT), color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Plot)

#no.panicles
dac %>% filter(pflowerT == 1) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = No.panicles, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="poisson"), se = F)
dac %>% filter(pflowerT == 1) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = No.panicles, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="poisson"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Year)
dac %>% filter(pflowerT == 1) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems,  y = No.panicles, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="poisson"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Plot)
```

```{r growth model selection}
gm.base.size <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.base.trt <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems+ trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.base.trt.int <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

##grow season total precip
gm.gs.precip <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems  + spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.precip.int <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems *spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.precip.trt <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems  + spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.precip.trt.int1 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems *spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.precip.trt.int2 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems  + spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.precip.trt.int3 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems *spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

#grow season ave temp
gm.gs.av.temp <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.int <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt.int1 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt.int2 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt.int3 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

#summer av
gm.summer.av.temp <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.int <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.trt <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.trt.int1 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.trt.int2 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.trt.int3 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

#summer max
gm.summer.max.temp <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.max.temp.int <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.max.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.max.temp.trt <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.max.temp.trt.int1 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.max.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.max.temp.trt.int2 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.max.temp.trt.int3 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.mean.max.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

#summer precip
gm.summer.p <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.int <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int1 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int2 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems + summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int3 <- lmer(log.no.stemsT1 ~ log.no.stems*summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = dac, REML = F)

################################################################################
###
growth <- mget(ls(pattern = "^gm")) #make a list of all of those models that start with gm (^ means start with)
growth_AICc<-aictab(cand.set = growth, modnames = NULL,second.ord=TRUE,nobs=NULL,sort=TRUE)

#rm(list = ls()[grepl("gm", ls())]) #removes everything with gm

# saving AIC table:
## names of models:
# names <- as.data.frame(names(growth))
# growth_AICc <- growth_AICc %>% 
#   arrange(Modnames)
# 
# names=data.frame(model.names = c(1:105))
# growth_AICc$model.names[[i]]
# 
# for (i in 1:105) {
#     names$formulas[[i]]<- formula(growth[[i]])
#     names$formulas <- names$formulas
# }

AIC.save <- growth_AICc %>% 
  arrange(AICc) %>% 
  slice_head(n =10)
AIC.save$vitalrate <- "growth"

summary(gm.summer.p)
```

```{r}
pred.dat.g <- expand.grid(log.no.stems = seq(min(dac$log.no.stems, na.rm = TRUE), max(dac$log.no.stems, na.rm = TRUE), by = .1), summer.tot.precip = c(-1.271, 1.443))
pred.dat.output.g <- cbind(pred.dat.g, as.data.frame(predict(gm.summer.p, newdata = pred.dat.g, type="response", re.form=~0, pred.var=TRUE)))
colnames(pred.dat.output.g)[ncol(pred.dat.output.g)] <- "log.no.stemsT1"  # Renaming the last column

(growth <- dac %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = log.no.stemsT1))+
  geom_point(aes(data = dac ,alpha = 0.5, size = summer.tot.precip), shape = 1)+
  #geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == 0), aes(x = log.no.stems, y = log.no.stemsT1), color = "grey", size = 1.5)+ 
  geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == 1), aes(x = log.no.stems, y = log.no.stemsT1), color = "lightblue", size = 1.5)+ 
  geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == -1), aes(x = log.no.stems, y = log.no.stemsT1), color = "orange", size = 1.5)+ 
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1))+
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "grey", linewidth = .2)+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5))+
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5))+
  labs( x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "log(Number of Stems) in t + 1"))

(growth <- dac %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.no.stems, y = log.no.stemsT1))+
  geom_point(data = dac ,alpha = 0.5, shape = 1)+
  geom_line(data = pred.dat.output.g, aes(color = factor(summer.tot.precip)),linewidth = 1.5) +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1), legend.position = "bottom")+
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "grey", linewidth = .2)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Summer total precipitation", values = c("darkorange","deepskyblue"), labels = c("Dry", "Wet")) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
  labs(x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "log(Number of Stems) in t + 1"))

ggsave(here("Figures", "Dactylis", "growth.png"), plot = growth, width = 8, height =8)


```
